书本节奏不快 很喜欢这种节奏 文章写的是一些日常温馨➕偶尔狗粮文章 两个女儿我最喜欢小女儿了 真的好可爱 总是幻想我也有个这样的女儿 哈哈哈哈哈哈 真的很不错 炒鸡推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1626103938,"group_id":"6943002488953900067","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N758WelsVLeanIeDlLjIqIg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b13bbeda32194ac881ea259fe5f6fcd7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776789234\u0026x-signature=rdqZF8%2Bwe6j8%2FbAMBeD1bpCWCKw%3D","user_id":"817629748789480","user_name":"袁哥哥哥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"817629748789480","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1662437818,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6943002488953900067","book_info":{"abstract":"【同名短剧已改编上线，大哥们支持一下娅宛，也看看短剧拍出来是不是你们心目中的娅宛】【番茄和红果短剧APP搜索重生签到：乡村奶爸种田忙即可观看】【日常温馨、单女主、萌娃、男主改过自新类】一朝病逝，再睁眼一个小奶娃泪汪汪说：“粑粑，别打，屁屁还疼着哒……”许庭泪崩！前世他醒悟太迟，今生定用生命补偿妻女！为助他赎罪，一个负责引导许庭当好奶爸的系统出现了……不久后，受宠的俩娃越发释放天性，一个蠢萌到极致：“呜呜，蜂子飞窝屁屁上啦！”一个高冷又傲娇：“爸爸，不准不爱我！”于是许庭拼命赚钱招上门女婿。某天，媳妇儿魅惑一笑：老公，我们再要个孩子吧……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.
